page_name: Solace Browser App Store — 18 App Tiles
context: Paper 11 (App Store Sync): App Store must show 18 app tiles. Verify: (1) tile count >= 18, (2) each tile has accessible label, (3) app icons load (no broken images), (4) install buttons labeled. James Bach: the app store is the product catalog — if tiles are broken, trust is broken.
